selected_windows.why_it_matters: This local intro-focused source should help establish the opening phase, title/attract handoff, first formation presentation, and earliest visible player-pressure cues for the scout-wave profile.
analysis_questions: What intro or title surface appears before gameplay?
How does the beginning phase hand off into formation presentation?
Are formation rows and flagship/escort families readable at 720p?
Does the intro window contain first movement, first shot, or first dive evidence?
selected_windows.notes: Exact timestamps are pending local clip review. This may become the preferred first beginning-phase source if it contains formation-entry evidence.

selected_windows.why_it_matters: This local Level 5 sample should help establish later-wave pressure, dive density, flagship/escort behavior under progression, and whether the first playable Galaxy Guardians slice needs hooks for escalating pressure even before full later-level support.
analysis_questions: How does Level 5 pressure differ from the opening wave?
How many attackers are visible at once during denser moments?
Are flagship and escort attack patterns visible?
Does player movement become more continuous under later pressure?
Can this source inform progression hooks for the scout-wave profile?
selected_windows.notes: Exact timestamps are pending local clip review. This source is a later-pressure complement to the intro and first-formation windows.

selected_windows.why_it_matters: This window should capture the first playable formation entry, rack completion, first alien dive, player movement, and first shot cadence needed for the scout-wave slice.
analysis_questions: How long does the formation take to settle?
When does the first dive begin relative to formation completion?
Does the first dive involve one alien or an escort group?
How strict does the single-shot cadence feel in the first exchange?
How much lateral correction does the player use before the first shot?
selected_windows.notes: Exact timestamps are intentionally pending until the source is locally reviewed or replaced by a reproducible emulator capture.

next_steps: Confirm whether the first candidate video can be locally clipped for analysis.
If not, create a local emulator capture with stable frame rate and documented settings.
Generate contact sheet and first-pass event log.
Promote high-confidence observations into the semantic scout-wave profile.
